## Checklist

- [ ] One focused logical change (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] Tests added/updated and passing
- [ ] All commits signed off under the DCO (`git commit -s`) — see [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Follows Conventional Commits (`type(scope): description`)
